description:
You are working as an integration developer who is validating the stability of several internal REST-based micro-services.  
    A consolidated execution log already exists at  
    /home/user/api_test/logs/api_integration.log  

    1. From that source log, extract every line that contains **either of the exact keywords**  
       • “ERROR”  
       • “FATAL”  

    2. Write the extracted lines, in their **original chronological order**, to a new file named  
       /home/user/api_test/logs/critical.log  

       a. Do **not** include any additional header, footer, or blank lines.  
       b. The resulting file must therefore contain **exactly five (5) lines** in total:  
          • four lines that contain the word “ERROR”  
          • one line that contains the word “FATAL”  

    3. After creating the file, print the contents of /home/user/api_test/logs/critical.log to the console, so a reviewer can immediately see the result.

    Verification notes for you:  
    • The automated test will check that /home/user/api_test/logs/critical.log exists, is readable, and contains precisely those five lines (no more, no less) in the same order they appeared in api_integration.log.  
    • Line-order preservation is important: do not sort or otherwise reorder.  
    • Achieve the whole extraction with a **single command-line invocation** (you may use pipes or redirection, but it should logically be one compound command).
truth:
<!-- Initial fixture that already exists when the agent starts -->
    <file path="/home/user/api_test/logs/api_integration.log"><![CDATA[
2024-09-10 10:15:21,345 INFO  [AuthService] - Authentication succeeded for user id 42
2024-09-10 10:15:22,103 WARN  [PaymentService] - Payment took longer than expected (842ms)
2024-09-10 10:15:23,511 ERROR [PaymentService] - Payment gateway timeout after 30000ms
2024-09-10 10:15:24,186 INFO  [NotificationService] - Email sent to user id 42
2024-09-10 10:15:25,902 ERROR [ShipmentService] - Invalid shipping address provided
2024-09-10 10:15:26,778 DEBUG [InventoryService] - Stock level for SKU-12345 is 98
2024-09-10 10:15:27,664 FATAL [InventoryService] - Database unreachable
2024-09-10 10:15:28,350 INFO  [AuthService] - Logout completed for user id 42
2024-09-10 10:15:29,021 ERROR [PaymentService] - Currency mismatch: expected USD got EUR
]]></file>

    <!-- Expected artefact that the agent must create -->
    <expected_file path="/home/user/api_test/logs/critical.log"><![CDATA[
2024-09-10 10:15:23,511 ERROR [PaymentService] - Payment gateway timeout after 30000ms
2024-09-10 10:15:25,902 ERROR [ShipmentService] - Invalid shipping address provided
2024-09-10 10:15:27,664 FATAL [InventoryService] - Database unreachable
2024-09-10 10:15:29,021 ERROR [PaymentService] - Currency mismatch: expected USD got EUR
]]></expected_file>
